review_title: If you are on the fence, take it.
description: Over the last 6-12 months, I've seen webstarts continue to develop its platform. They implemented a few features to make designers' life easier. Kudos to them! Support is EXTREMELY amazing. They always get back to me in 24-48 hours with actual helpful information. When I ask a tech question, they got their engineer to answer, not just some minimum wage person looking at their FAQ and giving me some half baked answer and left me hanging. They don't do that. You are in good hands with support when you need them.
author: Valor L.
pros: It is easy to use for a non technical designer to build landing pages, brochure style sites, and local business sites with ease. WebStarts team has really taken the thought to include everything that a website needs: email marketing, sign up forms, survey, calender, ecommerce, gallery, icon logos, stock photos and on and on all build-in-one. If you are starting out and looking for a simple solution to do it all, and came across this review, you are meant to use WebStarts.
cons: I feel to build a truly high quality website, with super custom CSS and all those fancy stuff, and custom solutions, WebStarts may not be for you. WebStarts is meant for easy to deploy, easy to use, let's-start-making-money-already type of websites. If you are a perfectionist, this is not for you.

review_title: WebStarts 🎵 ROCKS my Music Promotions Business!
description: Brilliant Team of designers and customer service personnel. I think I might be one of WebStarts original customers -- they've taken me through Amazon best-sellers, into the music business; Great wonderful team to do business with!
author: Emily H.
pros: AV Harrison Promotions has been in the books and music promotions business for 10 years and credits its consistent success to WebStarts which supports the company’s dot.com global presence. WebStarts TOTALLY 🎵 Rocks for easy-to-learn web design, Snappy tutorials, comprehensive global Net connective-ness, and ease of storefront eCommerce set up. Business that use WebStarts as their platform hosting service has Everything an online business needs to do marketing and promotional worldwide. As AV Harrison Publishing & Promotions begins its second decade, we will always recommend WebStarts to clients and colleagues in the book and music promotions business – WebStarts Team!! …You Rock The Stage! Emily Hill
cons: Hear anything?? Just crickets? That's because after 10 years of using WebStarts THIS questions stumps me.

review_title: Website Creator
description: I have had a good experience with Webstarts. It helps with creating a good webpage for my personal or business use.
author: beverly A.
pros: Webstarts is a web builder software that helps you to create a website for your personal and business use. I can submit daily post on whatever I choose to write about. I can share and promote my website. Its simple and basic to use. Its not difficult at all.
cons: You have to upgrade to get additional features on this software. To get the full effect you will have to upgrade for more features to enhance your web page.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I choose Webstarts because it was affordable and offered all the features I was looking for.
description: I have been able to stay connected with my students and provide them with subjects and activities to help them learn English. On each page, I build a lesson plan going from the presentation of the material (written, audio and/or video) to the homework section. It looks professional and everything is located on one site. It has also provided me with the opportunity to create a useful and up-to-date platform for my teaching.
author: Deborah B.
pros: Their drag and drop page builder is very easy to use and they offer many professional looking templates to get you up and going without wasting time. Perhaps what I appreciate the most though is their support team. They are always there to guide you and help you with any issues you may be experiencing. Their computer engineers were able to import my Wordpress Blog when I got stuck saving me a lot of time, money and stress. They never gave up until it was done. Their many tutorials also are fantastic giving you the feeling that they have really thought of everything. As an instructor, I also like the fact that I can integrate Flash files, video and audio onto my website.
cons: As it's a new platform, Webstarts has been able to incorporate some functionalities that were lacking such as Blog importing, page length, and designer pages. Their canvas-builder functions enable you to construct your site showing the changes you make in real time. You can add images, text, headings, gallery, calendars, contact forms and much more with only a few mouse clicks.

review_title: A good basic website builder
description: I had a good experience ands it is great value for money despite the lack of a native mobile site.
author: Fraser N.
pros: It is easy to use and has a surprising amount of features tucked away inside. Also easy to set up my own domain and email.
cons: The interface and UI is a bit old fashioned but not a massive issue when it works well. The biggest issue I have is that the sites are not mobile responsive naturally. Now you can make a mobile version of a site but it is like building a whole new site and moving around widgets and images etc is very fiddly!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Servicing !!!!
author: Pharis E.
pros: As A Satisfied Customer Of WebStarts, It is My Sincere Pleasure To Share A Positive & True Testimony That WebStarts Is By Far Hands Down The Best. Do-It-Yourself. Site For Creating/Designing Websites I've Ever Worked With.. & I've Explored More Than My Share But It WebStarts That I've Found To Be The Best And Easiest. The Templates Are Really Nice & Their Customer Service Is BEYOND Patient.. I've Designed Up To 9 Sites - & Aaron Dycus Has Been One Support I've Had The Privilege To Work With Me. I Recommend WebStarts To All I Design For. Note: I don't personally know CSR's but they will service u like they care about u & your site.
cons: Can't Download Zip Files...which will allow digital downloads to contain full album files :)

review_title: Webstarts no stuff wont no stuff!
description: Pretty good , enjoy technology 5Gspeeding the web up 8.25/10
author: Jeffrey P.
pros: Free websites All theTime and the other Template Choices is cool
cons: Domain purchase required And too many Upgrades
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: A simple way to create a well-functioning commercial website. Great experience working with their CS
description: I did not have to outsource the project and pay thousands of Dollars, spend time coordinating etc. I was able to create a well-functioning commercial website myself, save a lot of money. Their pricing is great too.
author: Don U.
pros: Simple Dashboard with a lot of useful functions. Desktop and phone functions enable you to create a well-ranked website. I tried other website building sights, get frustrated with their complicated un-creative tools. I was lucky to get on board with Webstarts. Creating a commercial website was easy. Their CS is fantastic, responsive and helpful. They improved their Dashboard over the years. Creating an appealing website with limited resources is easy. Their pricing is very, very affordable for all the features you want to add. Highly recommend them!

review_title: Easy to use
description: WE've found WebStarts to be a great solution for our business. We created a basic website with an online store. We update as often as we want and have found it easy to use and reasonably priced.
author: Marci F.
pros: We have found WebStarts to be easy to use and maintain. I can edit or add content easily. I like that updates are in real-time and editing is done in a format that makes it simple to see how your final product will look when published.
cons: I don't have any negative comments about WebStarts. Our company has had a very positive experience with designing and maintaining our website using their service.

review_title: Great product, great service, highly recommended.
description: Quickly and easily created a website that got real traffic and helped my business grow.
author: Adam B.
pros: Easy to use, responsive customer support, most features and apps. The drag and drop editor provides a dead simple interface. Domain setup is automatic which saves hours of configuration.
cons: The only con I see with WebStarts is the fact not everyone is using them. I don't know, maybe that's a good thing. I want to be on my own servers :D

review_title: Excellent product, excellent service
description: I have been using WebStarts since 2012 for three different businesses. Their platform is easy to use and intuitive. They have great tutorials and beautiful templates. The staff is super friendly, helpful and knowledgeable. They are customer oriented and respond very quickly whenever you need help. Additionally, their pricing is very reasonable and there are no hidden fees or gimmicks.
author: Lisa W.
pros: It's intuitive and easy to use. Over the years, the editor has been refined and updated to be even more user friendly

review_title: I experienced a company (Webstarts) that went the extra mile in helping my own company.
author: Nathan N.
pros: Webstarts offers everything in one shop without the bugs. The one on one support interaction is the best part. Anyone who runs their own company can clearly see that Webstarts is doing something right when you get the help you need.
cons: None. I have nothing negative to say about this company..

review_title: Great Website Builder. Better than Wordpress!
description: I run my design business using this software.
author: Darin P.
pros: Easy to use. Always adding new functions and options to the website builder. Use templates or start from scratch. You can fully edit the mobile site which is very important. Customer service / tech support is excellent!
cons: It can be a little glitchy sometimes, very minor. There is really nothing that would keep me from going somewhere else.

review_title: Hardly ever seen such high quality/price ratio!
description: Seven years ago not so many similar services and still a happy user! Needed to start something fast and WebStarts was there. No need to think twice ever since.
author: Mika M.
pros: Personal support always answers within the same business day (over 14 h time difference between Japan and USA) and often makes the changes on my site on behalf of me to save all of our time!
cons: Slightly limited features but getting better...:-) The ease of use covers these up easily! Would appreciate better text editing features.

review_title: Webmaster review
description: Provides a user friendly platform to develop and administer our website.
author: Margaret K.
pros: Tech Support - Professional, knowledgeable, quick response time, valuable suggestions, understandable and easily implemented solutions. Platform - Wide variety of design options, great selection of 'do to' videos and documentation, quick response time, minimal down time, reasonable costs.
cons: No phone support, although online support is responsive.

review_title: Create Writer Website
description: Overall, I love how I can create a website just for my writing project and I can create a portfolio. This website creator has so many options, so I create my website smoothly. I like how I have so many options to work with. This is a great site to create and make my vision come alive on my website.
author: Hanah S.
pros: I love how I can create my portfolio website with this website creator. I needed a site just like this. This site has so many portfolio templates that I can use. I can create how I want to create my writer website. I like how I can list the work I have done on this website creator. The text boxes and text description areas are easy. I can input the information without having to move so many boxes around the dashboard screen. I also love how the templates are clean and simple. I love how there is a business and email marketing button to add to my website if I want to add it. I also love how the design tools when creating my website are on the left side of the screen.
cons: I dislike the main website creator dashboard screen area. I like how it works, but the color isn't catching my attention. The color on the dashboard screen is dark and out of date. It would be cool if the screen color could change. It would be nice if I could change the work website area on the screen to the color I want.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Webstarts Easy Editing
description: Great Web Site for my music
author: Dennis S.
pros: Straight forward and easy to manage. Reliable
cons: I have not experienced any drawbacks. Nothing I can't figure out on the fly!

review_title: Decent Website Builder
description: Overall it is a decent web builder - as they grow and expand I hope it continues to improve.
author: Chris K.
pros: I usually hand code websites, but wanted to invest in a few "Web builders" to give my clients an options for a quicker turn around. WebStarts is one that I chose. It is fairly easy to use, and has a good amount of features/widgets to create a site on the fly.
cons: I would like to see more widgets - since you are limited to just what they offer, I think it is important for them to have a more expanded library of options to choose from.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use website builder for novices to pros
author: Jonathan K.
pros: Have used other "no-code" drag & drop website builders before, but none have been as intuitive & lived up to the promise of WebStarts. It really is easy to use and edit, and requires no "training".
cons: One of the main reasons I purchased the product was for it's membership functionality. Unfortunately, the features & customizability for membership is currently very limited. A little disappointing. Had to ask some really basic questions to Support. To their credit, they tried to give me "hacks" to overcome my basic challenges. Hopefully there will be some improvements in this area.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I am not very techy but was able to build my website by watching the how to videos with Webstarts.
author: Jess W.
pros: I love that I can update my website at any time without having to pay someone to do it for me. Webstarts has given me the tools to be able to create my site to represent who I am and help me reach my clients.

review_title: These guys got it together, the easiest web builder software that I have ever used. If I can set up
description: I could actually make a web site using it.
author: Harold M.
pros: These guys got it together, the easiest web builder software that I have ever used. If I can set up a website using Webstarts.com, anyone can.
cons: Have not found anything I don't like yet. This is the simplest Web software I have ever used, it puts word press to shame.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Facil herramienta para crer landing y web
author: Mónica D.
pros: Me gusta que tiene plantillas y resulta facil crear una web nueva desde una plantilla
cons: No se hasta que punto puedes trabajar el SEO y posicionarlo. También las plantillas son un poco antiguas.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
